text: Kal raat papa se startup switch karne ko lekar bohot behas hui, unhone saaf keh diya ki MNC ki permanent naukri chhodna bewaqoofi hai. Main janti hoon mera growth yahan ruk gaya hai, par unki zidd aur joint family me unki izzat ke darr se maine subah unse maafi maang li. Unka dil dukhakar aur ghar ka mahaul kharab karke main aage nahi badhna chahti, isliye ab chupchap wahi boring WFH login kar rahi hoon.

Papa ne bina mujhse pooche mere rishte ke liye haan keh di hai aur kal raat isi baat par hamara jhagda bina kisi nateeje ke khatam hua. Main abhi sirf apne career aur ghar ki EMI par focus karna chahta hoon, par unhone khandaan ki naak aur 'log kya kahenge' ka waasta dekar mujhe chup kara diya. Unse bagawat karke main parivaar me darar nahi dalna chahta, isliye ab bas unki khushi ke liye is rishte me haan milane ka naatak kar raha hoon.

Mera man shehar jaakar office join karne ka tha taaki WFH isolation se nikal sakun, par kal raat papa ne strictly mana kar diya kyunki unhe joint family me meri help ki zaroorat hai. Unhone chillakar kaha ki main matlabi ho gaya hoon aur unke budhape ka sahara nahi banna chahta. Unka BP aur ghar ki shanti dekh kar maine apna transfer request cancel kar diya, kyunki unhe dukh dekar milne wali azaadi mere liye kisi kaam ki nahi.

Kal raat ki bahas ke baad se papa ne mujhse baat karna band kar diya hai kyunki maine unke bataye huye property investment ke liye mana kiya tha. Meri salary se ghar ki EMI jaati hai, par unka authoritarian control itna hai ki main apna point of view rakh hi nahi sakta. Joint family me unki authority bani rahe aur mummy ko unki dant na sunni pade, isliye maine aaj subah unke papers par sign kar diye.

Software engineer hone ke baad bhi papa meri har financial decision khud lete hain, aur kal raat isi par hamari anban ho gayi. Unhone kaha ki unhone mujhe padhaya hai toh meri har cheez par unka haq hai, aur main samaj me unki bezzati kar rahi hoon. Unki izzat aur beti hone ke farz ke chakkar me maine apna gussa pee liya aur unhe wada kiya ki aage se wahi sab handle karenge.
